task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into the wger application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The wger web interface is visible in a browser, and the UI indicates a successful login (e.g., dashboard is shown, or user profile shows 'admin').

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the 'Morning Breakfast' meal within the 'Standard Dietary Plan'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the meal details page specifically for 'Morning Breakfast' under the 'Standard Dietary Plan'.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Whole Milk' and 'Chicken Egg' have been removed from the meal.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the final state of the 'Morning Breakfast' ingredient list, neither 'Whole Milk' nor 'Chicken Egg' are present.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Rolled Oats' is present in the meal with the correct amount.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ingredient list for 'Morning Breakfast' shows 'Rolled Oats' with a specified quantity of 50g.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Soy Milk' has been added to the meal with the correct amount.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ingredient list for 'Morning Breakfast' shows 'Soy Milk' with a specified quantity of 200g.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Firm Tofu' has been added to the meal with the correct amount.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ingredient list for 'Morning Breakfast' shows 'Firm Tofu' with a specified quantity of 100g.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the wger web interface to make changes rather than using backend scripts or API calls.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the web browser navigating the wger UI, searching for ingredients, and clicking add/delete buttons.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual wger application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows localhost (or 127.0.0.1) and the genuine wger UI is visible, not a text editor or mock-up.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI by directly modifying the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows, if visible, do not show SQL commands or python scripts directly modifying the wger database to complete the task.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Plan: 'Standard Dietary Plan'. Target Meal: 'Morning Breakfast'. Ingredients to remove: 'Whole Milk', 'Chicken Egg'. Ingredients to add: 'Soy Milk' (200g), 'Firm Tofu' (100g). Ingredients to keep: 'Rolled Oats' (50g). The final meal must contain exactly these three ingredients with their specified weights.
